2605.12920.title: Embodied Multi-Agent Coordination by Aligning World Models Through Dialogue
2605.12920.paper_summary: Effective collaboration between embodied agents requires more than acting in a shared environment; it demands communication grounded in each agent's evolving understanding of the world. When agents can only partially observe their surroundings, coordination without communication is provably hard, but communication can, in principle, bridge this gap by allowing agents to share observations and align their world models. In this work, we examine whether LLM-based embodied agents actually realize the ability to communicate. We extend PARTNR, a benchmark for collaborative household robotics, with a natural-language dialogue channel that enables two agents with partial observability to communicate during task execution. To evaluate whether dialogue leads to genuine world-model alignment rather than superficial coordination, we propose a framework for measuring world-model alignment defined over per-agent world graphs: observation convergence (do private world models align over time?), information novelty (do messages convey what the partner lacks?), and belief-sensitive messaging (do agents model what their partner knows?). Our experiments across three LLMs reveal that dialogue reduces action conflicts 40 to 83 percentage points but degrades task success relative to silent coordination. Using our metrics, we characterize the gap between superficial coordination and genuine world-model alignment, and identify where current models fall on this spectrum.
2605.12920.paper_summary_zh: 有效的具身代理之間的合作不僅僅需要在共享環境中行動；它要求基於每個代理對世界不斷演變的理解進行溝通。當代理只能部分觀察周圍環境時，沒有溝通的協調是可證明的困難，但溝通在原則上可以通過允許代理分享觀察結果並對齊他們的世界模型來彌補這一差距。在這項工作中，我們研究基於LLM的具身代理是否真正實現了溝通的能力。我們擴展了PARTNR，一個針對協作家庭機器人的基準，增加了一個自然語言對話通道，使得兩個具有部分可觀察性的代理在任務執行過程中能夠進行溝通。為了評估對話是否導致真正的世界模型對齊而非表面的協調，我們提出了一個測量基於每個代理世界圖的世界模型對齊的框架：觀察收斂（私人世界模型是否隨時間對齊？）、信息新穎性（消息是否傳達了夥伴所缺乏的內容？）以及信念敏感消息（代理是否建模了夥伴所知道的內容？）。我們在三個LLM上的實驗顯示，對話減少了40到83個百分點的行動衝突，但相對於無聲協調卻降低了任務成功率。利用我們的指標，我們描述了表面協調與真正世界模型對齊之間的差距，並確定了當前模型在這一光譜上的位置。
2605.12920.author: Vardhan Dongre et.al.
